description: Harden sensitive Convex authorization boundaries by moving identity-sensitive reads and writes behind internal server-only functions, eliminating direct server-page public Convex access, cleaning stale Conductor artifacts, and refreshing docs/tests.
deviation_notes: This unattended run superseded and removed an abandoned March 9 track artifact (`teacher_provisioning_cleanup_20260309`) left by a previous run. The final verified change set also absorbed compatible teacher-provisioning and demo-access hardening edits already present in the worktree, because they were security-adjacent, fully tested, and part of the requested unfinished-run cleanup.
